sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Seed Bank Steward cooperative curation and provenance
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated accession provenance, pollination networks, or cooperative curator and field-scientist roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Floodplain Architect cooperative planning and procedural basins
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural terrain, evacuation routing, or cooperative hydrologist and community-planner roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Rigging Rescue Lab advanced systems and cooperative roles
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated compound anchors, directional loads, richer knot choices, or cooperative attendant and hauler roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Pantry Planner volunteer and dietary-needs variants
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds explicit dietary constraints, volunteer capacity, or cooperative buyer and distributor roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Caption Control Room multilingual and cooperative variants
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds language switching, overlapping speakers, or cooperative editor and timing roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Bookbinding Studio repair bench and multi-section variants
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds defect diagnosis, reversible repair choices, multi-section imposition, or richer stitch paths without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Dialect Drift Lab phonology and cooperative fieldwork variants
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds rule-based phonology, richer migration shocks, or cooperative researcher and community roles without storage or network behavior.

recentDecisions.title: Seed Bank Steward 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local conservation strategy simulation with three vaults, crop traits, viability decay, genetic diversity, climate requests, cooling failures, germination tests, regeneration, seed releases, emergency recovery, scoring, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Floodplain Architect 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local spatial flood-planning simulation with three basins, changing storm pulses, terrain and runoff, wetlands, levees, channels, shelters, limited budgets, damage and recovery, scoring, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Rigging Rescue Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local rescue-engineering simulation with three incidents, SVG rope systems, selectable anchors, gear and time limits, mechanical advantage, friction and redundancy tradeoffs, failure recovery, scoring, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.
